narration: When dedication meets destiny, legends are born. TERMI - from countless hours of practice to the championship throne. Cloud9's finest warrior, where every click counts and every victory echoes. This is more than gaming - this is the pursuit of excellence.
visual_prompts: Cinematic low-angle shot of TERMI in Cloud9 jersey sitting at professional gaming setup with RGB lighting, multiple monitors displaying Valorant gameplay, dramatic stadium lighting with blue and white spotlights, crowd silhouettes in background, Indian esports arena atmosphere

Dynamic overhead tracking shot of five Cloud9 players in synchronized gaming positions, mechanical keyboards clicking in rhythm, professional headsets glowing, large LED screens showing tournament bracket, warm golden hour lighting mixed with cool gaming RGB, crowd waving Indian flags

Emotional close-up of TERMI removing headset in slow motion as confetti falls, teammates embracing in celebration, championship trophy gleaming under broadcast lights, crowd erupting with 'TERMI' chants echoing, cinematic depth of field with bokeh stadium lights, victory moment captured in Indian esports glory
